markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 1. Offenses [40000.1 - 40273]
#### Article 1. Violation of Code [40000.1 - 40008]
##### § 40000.77

A violation of Article 7 (commencing with Section 2570) of Chapter 2.5 of Division 2, relating to transportation of school pupils, is a misdemeanor, and not an infraction.

*(Added by Stats. 1990, Ch. 1563, Sec. 62.)*

subsections.text: A violation of Article 7 (commencing with Section 2570) of Chapter 2.5 of Division 2, relating to transportation of school pupils, is a misdemeanor, and not an infraction.
